description_long: This is a modern pendant lamp featuring three elongated, conical lamp heads suspended from a circular ceiling mount. The lamp heads are finished in matte black, each connected to the mount by a slender black cord and accented with a gold metallic section near the top of each shade. The cords are evenly spaced around the mount, allowing the lamp heads to hang at slightly different angles, creating a dynamic and contemporary appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric simplicity. The lamp is likely constructed from metal for both the mount and shades, with the gold accents providing a touch of elegance. This fixture is suitable for urban interiors such as cafes, lobbies, or modern residential spaces.
description: A modern, three-head pendant lamp with matte black conical shades, gold accents, and a circular ceiling mount. The design is minimalist and geometric, ideal for contemporary urban interiors.
description_view_0: Three black conical lamp heads with gold accents hang from a round ceiling mount, with all three heads clearly visible and spaced apart.
description_view_1: The lamp is viewed from an angle where the three lamp heads align more closely, partially obscuring one behind the others.
description_view_2: All three lamp heads are visible, with the central head most prominent and the others slightly behind, showing the even spacing of the cords.
description_view_3: Two lamp heads are clearly visible, with the third mostly hidden behind the others, emphasizing the staggered arrangement.
